channel.title: Control on Zero Note
channel.description: Recent content in Control on Zero Note

item.title: How to Send a Self-Destructing Note That Actually Disappears
item.description: A simple way to share a note that disappears after it has done its job.

item.title: How to Share a Note Securely(Without Leaving a Trace)
item.description: A simpler way to share sensitive information without leaving it sitting in chat history or email forever.
